creator: bzeeb+freebsd+ports@zabbadoz.net
text:
varnish 3.0.0 was released.

Fix: 

I'd suggest a repo-copy from varnish to varnish3 or something then apply the change:

http://people.freebsd.org/~bz/20110618-04-port-www-varnish-3.0.0.diff

it compiles and the package builds cleanly it seems.  Running you'll have to figure out;)

One new files/patch-* file at least I needed w/o pkgconfig.

Have fun.
